Alibaba Cloud
Publicidad
Blooming Silent Dreams: A Symphony of Colors by Terrence 🌸✨

Meet Terrence Chia Soon Ming, a 4-year-old "Little Dreamer" from the Malaysian Federation of the Deaf -MFD. In his world, colors don't just sit on paper—they dance like ribbons.

Using Qwen3.6-Plus to interpret the poetic soul of his brushstrokes and Wan2.7 to breathe life into the scene, Alibaba Cloud transformed his silent sketch into a vibrant, blooming masterpiece. This is how we let the world hear the music of a child's imagination. 🎨🚀

🔗: https://int.alibabacloud.com/m/1000411682/

#AlibabaCloud #Qwen #Wan #BloomingSilentDreams #MFD #AIforGood #LittleDreamers

Blooming Silent Dreams: The Candy Day House by Cyrus 🏠🍬

Meet Cyrus Tan Hoei Sam, an 11-year-old "Little Dreamer" from Malaysian Federation of the Deaf -MFD. Cyrus imagined a little house made of soft red clay that wakes up to start a "candy day" under marshmallow clouds.

Qwen3.6-Plus translated the intricate details of his red-clay home, and Wan2.7 breathed life into the bubbles and gumballs floating over the grass. This project shows that no dream is too quiet to be heard. 🎨🍭

🔗: https://int.alibabacloud.com/m/1000411682/ 

#AlibabaCloud #Qwen #Wan #BloomingSilentDreams #MFD #AIforGood #LittleDreamers

Blooming Silent Dreams: Rusyaidi’s Golden Wings 🎭🐝

"Magic’s hiding everywhere." Muhammad Rusyaidi bin Mohd Kassim Kalitasan, a 10-year-old "Little Dreamer" from Malaysian Federation of the Deaf -MFD, painted a golden face that breathes life into flowers and invites us to fly with golden wings.

Alibaba Cloud’s Qwen3.6-Plus understood the profound depth of his "Dear Friend" on the wall, and Wan2.7 rendered this surreal, beautiful dream into a flowing masterpiece. Every dream deserves to bloom. ✨🌸

🔗: https://int.alibabacloud.com/m/1000411682/ 

#AlibabaCloud #Qwen #Wan #BloomingSilentDreams #MFD #AIforGood #LittleDreamers

Blooming Silent Dreams: The Chubby Bee’s Jelly Sky 🐝✈️

Nur Aira Inara binti Mohd Rassidin takes us to the skies! Her dream features a "chubby bee" airplane zooming through a world of mushrooms and jelly clouds.

Qwen3.6-Plus captured the whimsical energy of her flight, while Wan2.7 animated the engine’s jiggle and the vibrant sky. For the children at Malaysian Federation of the Deaf -MFD, AI serves as a powerful amplifier, letting the world witness the boundless joy they paint in silence. 🍄✨

🔗: https://int.alibabacloud.com/m/1000411682/ 

#AlibabaCloud #Qwen #Wan #BloomingSilentDreams #MFD #AIforGood #LittleDreamers

CGTN
Publicidad • Medio de comunicación controlado por el Estado de China
Live: Yellow River's annual sediment flushing underway at Xiaolangdi Dam in central China's Henan

The outflow from the Xiaolangdi Dam in central #China's #Henan Province has transitioned from clear to turbid, marking the commencement of the 2025 #YellowRiver pre-flood water and sediment regulation phase, which involves sediment flushing. This phase is expected to last until July 9, with over 100 million tonnes of sediment discharged. How does the Xiaolangdi Dam flush out the accumulated sediment from the reservoir? After the sediment discharge concludes, what additional work will need to be done? Join CGTN's livestream as we take you to the site for an on-the-ground look! #CGTNonsite

Blooming Silent Dreams: Aulia’s Crystal Garden 💎🌸
"Crystal petals glowing bright, one soft breath brings them to light." Aulia Ayesha binti Mohamad Faizol Anizam, a 6-year-old "Little Dreamer" from Malaysian Federation of the Deaf -MFD, created a magical garden where flowers are made of sugar and glass.

Alibaba Cloud’s Qwen3.6-Plus listened to the sweetness of her vision, and Wan2.7 brought these sparkling, neon flowers to life. In Aulia’s dream, everything is connected and inclusive. 🦋🍭

🔗: https://int.alibabacloud.com/m/1000411682/

Jimmie Davidson
Publicidad
The Beach Boys Series 🌊 — A Message for you! 

Before leading at Send Network and @EverywhereChurch, I had the honor of founding and pastoring Highlands Fellowship   Highlands will always be home to me — and this message from 2011 highlights that.   

In this talk, delivered just after one of the worst East Coast storms,  I unpack four biblical steps to take in any storm — and the single most important decision you’ll ever make. It’s real, raw, and rooted in God’s Word.

🎥 You’ll see why Highlands became a model for churches around the world.

🙏 I’m forever proud of the Highlanders — still bold, still reaching people, still shining, now being led by Timmy Brown!!! 

PS: I’ve been shaped by faithful mentors and biblical voices over the years. I told the Highlanders then — and I’ll say it again now — my mission isn’t to be original but to be effective.

I want people to know Jesus and be some of the best-fed believers on earth.

Let’s go!

#EverywhereChurch #HighlandsFellowship #StormFaith #GlobalChurch

Meet me back at Highlands in this timeless message: 
👇Click the Link and Hold On!!! There’s a storm coming! ⚡️
